books.title: The Solver's Mind
books.subtitle: A Field Manual for Rewiring Problem-Solving from the Ground Up
books.description: Twenty lenses for seeing problems clearly before you reach for a solution — perception, systems, and meta-solving in one lattice.

books.title: Release Engineering at Scale
books.subtitle: Design Patterns for CI/CD Pipelines
books.description: A field manual of CI/CD design patterns — from hermetic builds and GitOps to planetary rollouts, MLOps, and case studies from teams shipping at real scale.

books.title: From Silicon to Supercluster
books.subtitle: The 0.1% infrastructure engineer doesn't read documentation. They read silicon.
books.description: From CPU memory walls to 10,000-GPU superclusters — 68 chapters covering the hardware, kernel, networking, consensus, orchestration, AI infrastructure, and data platform layers that most engineers treat as magic.
